nasb.text: that you should remember the words spoken beforehand by the holy prophets and the commandment of the Lord and Savior spoken by your apostles.

esv.text: that you should remember the predictions of the holy prophets and the commandment of the Lord and Savior through your apostles,

cnv.text: 叫你們記起聖先知說過的話，和主救主藉著使徒傳給你們的誡命。

ccb.text: 叫你们记得从前圣先知们说的预言，以及我们的主和救主借着派到你们那里的使徒所传给你们的诫命。

csbs.text: 要使你们想起圣先知们曾经说过的话，以及你们的使徒们所传的主、救主的命令。
